subject: Assess FMCG domain-specific feature completeness
description: Evaluate: (1) Promotional effects isolated? (2) Regional variation (market/retailer) incorporated? (3) Brand-level differences captured? (4) Category effects (CSD subcategories) considered? (5) Inventory/supply constraints noted? (6) Seasonality source identified (calendar vs promotional)? Output: fmcg_domain_assessment.md with findings + recommendations.
